text:
いつも気軽に引き受けていただいて
本当にありがとうございます！

でも、僕の予測が正しいと
かなり危険な観察になるはずです。
火傷には充分、注意してくださいね！

僕の観察も大事ですけど
<%me>さんの
身体はもっと大事だし……
くれぐれも無理はしないでください

You're always so ready and willing to take on
my requests. It means so much to me!

But if my forecasts are correct, this might be a
bit of a risky mission. You'll want to watch
out for burns.

I mean, I think my research is important, but
definitely not more important than your safety,
<%me>.
Just do what seems reasonable to you!
